---
title: 'Mobile Machine Learning Hardware at ARM: A Systems-on-Chip (SoC) Perspective'
author:
- Yuhao Zhu
- Matthew Mattina
- Paul Whatmough
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/sysml18.pdf
journ: SysML
year: 2018
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 20
---
